scores.correctness_notes: Covers most events but missing several from gold standard: collect_app_status, collect_unit_status, collect_metrics, and action events (<name>_action). Also missing deprecation notes for leader_settings_changed and pre/post series upgrade hooks.
scores.hallucination_notes: Uses hyphenated naming convention (e.g. 'config-changed') instead of underscore convention used in ops framework (e.g. 'config_changed'). No event class names (InstallEvent, etc.) provided. Description of update-status as 'every 5 minutes' is an implementation detail not in gold standard but plausible. Missing collect_app/unit_status and action events which are in gold standard.
